feed.title: SAP Community - PLM EAM/Plant Maintenance
feed.subtitle: PLM EAM/Plant Maintenance Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Meas doc creation allows points for items not related to Notif Tech OBj
entry.content:
While maintaining a notification for a tech object, users are going to Extras/Measurement Docs.

They then enter a measurement point. The MP entered is not related to the Tech Object on the notification.

Is this proper behavior? Do we need to find a note (I have not found one) or use a badi to enforce Meas Points belong to the notification being maintained?

entry.title: How can I open one PM plan with two different equipment that have different cycle start date
entry.content:
How can I open one PM plan with two different equipment that have different cycle start date


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Default Planned work time in operation for PM order
entry.content:
My requirement is to how populate default Planned work time, here in the PM order operation:

These orders are generated background from Maintenance plans
- I have tried to create a general task list and assign it in the maintenance plan, but the work center from task list is replacing the order or maintenance plan work center.
- Also I have tried to create a parameter in work center default value tab or constant but it doesn't get copy to the order

I want to achieve this by configurational steps depend on order type or plant or work center
So, is this possible instead of using BADI or user-exits

entry.title: Material with plant and storage location flagged for deletion
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Material with plant and storage location flagged for deletion but still we can add in components of work order. Is this standard? If standard can we go with an enhancement for this to throw an error? If we go with enhancement will it have any adverse effects.

Regards,

Preethi

entry.title: Deletion of Code Group and Code from Catalog
entry.content:
Hi Team,

When a catalog code is used within notifications, the usage flag gets set in catalog. Can we uncheck this flag when all usages are reversed? Is there a way to uncheck this flag?

Regards,

Preethi

entry.title: Work Permit in S4 Hana
entry.content:
Hi All, 

Greetings !

I got idea of business process around work permit following this link https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/work-permit-wcm-in-sap-s4-hana-eam/qaq-p/13801330/comment-id/4194543#M4194543  . Can anyone please let me know about below details . Basically I am looking for configuration & user steps . 

Key SAP WCM Configuration to model the above process in SAP S/4HANA 1909 

User experience with SAP S/4HANA 1909 and beyond

Thanking you very much .

Best Regards 

Mohammed

entry.title: Request Maintenance Fiori app: How to make Standard Field Mandatory
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

In the Standard Fiori app 'Request Maintenance', how can you make the Highlighted field (Technical Object) mandatory?

I tried looking into the 'Manage your solution' application however it seems like it's not applicable for S/4HANA on-premise system. 

2234180 - SAP S/4HANA Application “Manage Your Solution“ - SAP for Me

I'm currently looking into SPRO but haven't found related config so far.

 

Thanks

entry.title: Changing of CS notification type after creation
entry.content:
As per business requirement, CS notification type is to be changed from one notification type to another notification type by using the T. Code: IW52.
Is there any option to modify the notification type after creation.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Maintenance Item is not calling under single cycle plan SAP ECC
entry.content:
Hello,

 

I'm trying to manually call a maintenance item that is part of a single cycle plan.

I have under this plan:

1 MON

2 MON

6 MON

12 MON

The 6 MON maintenance item is not generating out when using IP30. All other plans will generate.

Can you please assist me in figuring out how to schedule the 6 MON maintenance item from the plan?

entry.title: Maintenance call dates
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We have a Maintenance Plan of the cycle of 1 Year, start of cycle - 01/05/2022 and Call Horizon is 30 Days. There are no shift factors or Tolerance set up. For this year why the work order got created automatically on 29/03/2024 instead of 01/04/2024.

Regards,

Preethi

entry.title: Purchase order item of order still without final billing indic. message
entry.content:
Hi Team,

When we try to business close the work order we are getting the below warning message:

Purchase order item of order still without final billing indic.

Message no. IW215

Can you please help us on this if we can check final invoice indicator in the PO and let us know the significance of doing so.

Regards,

Preethi

entry.title: Orders has not generated based on Call Date
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We have Strategy based Maintenance Plan with cycles of 3M,6M,1Y the previous order got generated on 24/05/2024 for the next order the Planned date is on 22/11/2024 and Call date is on 24/08/2024 but the call did not get generated and status is in Scheduled hold. Why so?

Regards,

Preethi

entry.title: Fleet Management SAP PM - synchronisation with financial assets
entry.content:
Dear all,

I would like to automatically update fields between equipment master (Fleet managment) and financial asset master - especially license plate number.

Enhancements: AAPM0001 (transaction: SMOD), components: EXIT_SAPLAAPM_001 & EXIT_SAPLAAPM_002 were already used for updating other fields of equipment master (non-fleet mgmt.), that were not available in the standard list. 

Can this be also used for fields of fleet management? If not, what would be a valid alternative?

Thanks Sunnyi 🙂

entry.title: FM to create Measurement Document in Mass
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Please can you let me know the FM to create measurement document in mass. The input fields should be as follows: Measuring Point, Start date , End date, Read By and Counter Difference. The Counter difference should have atleast 3 characters.

Regards,

Preethi

entry.title: Alternative labeling for function location & replacing plant & company code
entry.content:
Hello,

I need help with a business requirement to change the company code and plant. We need to transfer all functional locations and equipment to new plants. All functional locations will have new labels with the same structure indicator.

My concerns:

  1. I plan to activate alternative labeling to change functional location labels. What impact will this have on all master data associated with the functional locations (equipment, maintenance plans, task lists, etc.) and on system operations and reporting?

  2. Is there a solution for mass changing new labels and company codes?

Thanks!

entry.title: Mass changes Equipment master in PM module
entry.content:
I need to make mass changes of Equipment master.
For example, to assign a different value of Cost centre to 1000 objects (Equipment master). How can I do it?
LSMW doesn't work and W is restricted in the context of data migrations to SAP S/4HANA (note 2287723)

Migration Cockpit is intended for initial data load - not for change. 
What should I do? Create ABAP-program for each case?

Thanks.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Create Order window to pick Order Type based on Notification field value
entry.content:
Hi,

SAP standard functionality for Work order creation from Notification (IW21/IW22) is that once we click on the create button adjacent to Order field, the "Create Order" window pops-up. Based on Order-Notification Integration in SPRO, the Work Order type is proposed automatically along with additional data like default Work center and Planner Group. 

Now as per our client requirement we have 02 Order Types (PMA1 & PMA2)  for a single Notification type (Z1). We have 02 priorities (F1 & F2). Our requirement is that if F1 is selected then PMA1 appears in Create Order window or PMA2 when F2 priority is selected. 

Will appreciate inputs on this requirement.

Regards

Faisal

entry.title: Changing settlement receiver
entry.content:
Hello,

we have this issue-work order was created with WBS element "A". After that WBS element was changed to WBS"B". Now when you open WO ->Settlement rule first time in column Settlement receiver is WBS"A", go out and back to settlement rule and in column settlement receiver is WBS"B".  

first attempt second attempt

entry.title: Contracts in Non-Stock Component
entry.content:
Hi Team,

How can we assign the contracts for a Non-Stock Component in Task List.

Regards,

Preethi.

entry.title: Unrestricted stock in storage locations for maintenance orders using fiori apps
entry.content:
Hello Experts!

We are implementing the corrective maintenance process (BH1) in S/4HANA Cloud, Private Edition, and are aiming to manage everything through Fiori apps. During testing, we encountered an issue: when a maintenance order consumes a material that is out of stock in any storage location, the system allows the process to proceed without showing any error or message in the Fiori app (Create/Change Maintenance Order).

For example, when performing the same process in the SAP GUI transaction (IW31/IW32), the system displays the unrestricted-use stock as a field in the storage location search help, as shown below:

However, when we open the storage location search help in the Fiori app, the stock information is not available:

We would like to know if there is a similar functionality that allows us to view unrestricted-use stock in specific storage locations, similar to the SAP GUI, or if there is an option to activate a warning message. Alternatively, is it possible to extend the search help functionality in the Fiori app to add the stock fields using ABAP code ?

 

Thank you in advance for your help and best regards!
